news.headline: Craig-Hallum Maintains Delcath Systems with Buy Rating
news.summary: Analysts including Craig-Hallum and CCORF reaffirmed Buy ratings with price targets around $21, signaling continued Wall Street confidence in HEPZATO's commercial ramp. Bullish sentiment supports the stock after earlier guidance-related pressure.

news.headline: Delcath Systems Announces First Patient Dosed in Phase 2 Clinical Trial of HEPZATO in Liver-Dominant Metastatic Breast Cancer
news.summary: First patient dosed at the European Institute of Oncology in Milan in the ~90-patient randomized DELUMA trial (NCT06875128) evaluating HEPZATO plus standard of care in HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer. Marks a key pipeline expansion beyond ocular melanoma into a much larger indication.

news.headline: Delcath Systems added to Russell 2000 Value Benchmark
news.summary: Inclusion in the Russell 2000 Value index broadens institutional ownership and passive-fund demand. Index membership improves visibility and can support liquidity for the small-cap name.

news.headline: Delcath Systems Surges 5.6% on Above-Average Volume
news.summary: Shares jumped 5.6% on elevated trading volume, reflecting renewed investor interest ahead of index inclusion and pipeline milestones. Indicates improving momentum and sentiment in the stock.

news.headline: Delcath Systems Announces Two ASCO 2026 Investigator Initiated Trials-in-Progress Abstracts
news.summary: Two investigator-initiated trials-in-progress abstracts featuring HEPZATO were presented at the 2026 ASCO meeting, expanding clinical evidence and physician engagement. Reinforces the growing academic base supporting HEPZATO across indications.

news.headline: Delcath Q1 revenue hits $25M with 2026 outlook of $100M+
news.summary: Q1 2026 revenue rose to $25.0M (from $19.8M a year earlier) at 85% gross margin, with $89.3M cash and no debt; management reiterated at least $100M full-year 2026 revenue guidance. Solid commercial execution though R&D and SG&A drove a small net loss.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings
catalysts.detail: Second-quarter results expected in early August, a key test of the $100M+ full-year revenue guidance and HEPZATO KIT volume growth.

catalysts.label: $100M+ revenue target
catalysts.detail: Full-year 2026 guidance of at least $100M revenue implies ~20% HEPZATO volume growth; execution against this is the primary near-term driver.

catalysts.label: DELUMA breast cancer trial ramp
catalysts.detail: Phase 2 HEPZATO breast cancer trial (NCT06875128) enrolling at 20+ US/EU sites after first dose in Milan; site expansion and early enrollment updates ahead.

catalysts.label: mCRC Phase 2 interim data
catalysts.detail: Ongoing HEPZATO-plus-immunotherapy melanoma combination work (CHOPIN showed response rates rising to ~76%) and colorectal-cancer study support label/indication expansion potential.

pulse: Delcath is executing well commercially, with Q1 revenue of $25M, 85% gross margins, a clean balance sheet ($89M cash, no debt), and reiterated $100M+ 2026 guidance. Momentum is building via pipeline expansion into metastatic breast cancer (DELUMA) and Russell 2000 index inclusion, and analysts maintain Buy ratings around $21. Sentiment is cautiously bullish, though the stock trades well below targets as investors wait for guidance to be proven out and pipeline data to mature.
